headers.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://code.jquery.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; font-src 'self' data: https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; connect-src 'self' https: wss:; frame-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'
